rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Register route instantiates AuthService and payloadInstance but never uses them — falls back to old UserStore utility, violating task requirements","scope":"src/app/api/auth/register/route.ts"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"When a task requires using AuthService (PBKDF2) over a legacy utility, adding dead code that looks correct will pass a casual review but fail correctness checks","scope":"auth implementation"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Always verify the call chain — confirming AuthService is instantiated is insufficient; confirm it is actually invoked in the request path","scope":"code review"}]}
